description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push, pull request, tag creation, and a weekly schedule. The workflow should have three jobs: build-ubuntu on ubuntu-22.04, build-osx on macos-13, and build-windows on windows-2022. Each job checks out the repository, installs dependencies, generates a project with CMake, builds it with Ninja, and runs tests. The build-osx and build-windows jobs also create installers and upload them as artifacts, but skip this step for pull requests.
